testcase.name: test_email_logs_endpoint

failure.message:
AssertionError: Email log should have 'provider' field assert 'provider' in {'body': 'Dear Siddhant,

This is a friendly reminder that you have a pending payment of ₹25,100.

Total Fee: ₹125,100
Amount Paid: ₹100,000
Pending: ₹25,100

Please log in to your LEAMSS portal to complete the payment.

Thank you,
LEAMSS Immigration Services', 'id': 'efac3799-d296-4b85-9842-d9a116da0052', 'related_id': 'b334b9f5-f133-4f66-9c43-04f9d3c3f807', 'sent_at': '2026-04-09T11:48:53.533000', ...}

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_iteration37_phase1_features.py:314: in test_email_logs_endpoint assert "provider" in log, "Email log should have 'provider' field" E AssertionError: Email log should have 'provider' field E assert 'provider' in {'body': 'Dear Siddhant,

This is a friendly reminder that you have a pending payment of ₹25,100.

Total Fee: ₹125,100
Amount Paid: ₹100,000
Pending: ₹25,100

Please log in to your LEAMSS portal to complete the payment.

Thank you,
LEAMSS Immigration Services', 'id': 'efac3799-d296-4b85-9842-d9a116da0052', 'related_id': 'b334b9f5-f133-4f66-9c43-04f9d3c3f807', 'sent_at': '2026-04-09T11:48:53.533000', ...}
